---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for brigade
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!--
What concrete problem are you running into that the current brigade doesn't solve?
Be specific. "It would be useful to..." is not a problem. "When I tried to X, Y happened
and that made me do Z manually every time" is a problem.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
What do you think brigade should do differently? New agent? New command? Hook? Config option?
Describe at the level of "when the user runs X, brigade should do Y".
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
Any workarounds you've tried, other ways to solve the same problem, or similar features
in other plugins (devteam, teamclaude, oh-my-claudecode, etc.) that do this well.
-->

## Scope

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Change to an existing agent
- [ ] New agent (role, specialist reviewer, or diagnostic)
- [ ] Change to an existing command
- [ ] New command
- [ ] Hook (SessionStart, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.)
- [ ] Config option in `.planning/config.json`
- [ ] Documentation / examples
- [ ] Other

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to try a PR
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context

<!-- Use case, links to related issues, prior art -->
